title: Not our responsibility: Prasar Bharati to Delhi High Court on plea to broadcast FIFA World Cup 2026 in India
description: Public service broadcaster Prasar Bharati told the Delhi High Court that it is "not responsible" to acquire broadcasting rights of the FIFA World Cup 2026 in India. Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav heard these submissions on the petition seeking broadcast of the FIFA World Cup 2026 in India through public broadcaster Prasar Bharati.The petitioner Advocate Avdhesh Bairwa today sought to withdraw the petition with liberty to approach another competent court for an appropriate remedy.thT
